AdditionalAttributes.description:
Mini in Size, Mighty in Snackability
Parkers Baked Pretzel Minis Multipack of 8 Salted 200g may be bite-sized snacks, but they are hardly mini when it comes to snack satisfaction. Each pack of baked pretzels offers a delightful exploration of the senses. Coated lightly with salt, biting into this baked snack brings a satisfying crunch to your day. When you need a mini salty snack to tide you over, reach for one of these mighty multipacks.

Ready to Go When You Are
If it's a convenient snack for on the go you're looking for, then these salty pretzels are your answer. With 8 portions in this multipack, everyone can enjoy a taste of what Parkers pretzels have to offer. No matter if you're looking to embark on an all-day outdoor activity, or need a new addition to your workbreak lunchbox, these mini pretzels are always ready.

Wholesome Fun For All
When it comes to wholesome snacks, Parkers pretzels are a permissible treat all can enjoy when snack time comes around. Each mini pretzel is low in saturated fat and contains no added MSG, making them an easy choice to add to your family's pantry. With 8 portions to spread out in the multipack, everyone can get their hands on this baked snack. However, they better move quickly before the pack is gone!

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Fresh Fruit Bananas Yellow. A versatile product with Rainforest Alliance certification, it's ideal for snacking, baking, and smoothies. Shop now!
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Fresh Fruit Bananas Yellow are versatile Cavendish bananas, a delicious choice for their naturally sweet flavour. These ripe bananas are ideal for snacking, baking, and delicious smoothies. They are also Rainforest Alliance certified.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose bananas based on your usage. For peak flavour today or tomorrow, select yellow bananas with light brown flecks.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy these ripe bananas as a convenient snack, in fruit salads, or blended into refreshing smoothies. They are also excellent for baking.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store bananas at room temperature to ripen. Refrigerating stops ripening and may blacken skins, though the fruit remains edible.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Baking.</section>

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Fresh Granny Smith Apples' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Fresh Granny Smith Apples. A crisp and juicy product with tangy flavour, ideal for snacking or cooking. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Fresh Granny Smith Apples are a popular choice, known for their vibrant green skin and crisp texture. These juicy apples offer a distinctly tangy and zesty flavour, perfect as a refreshing dessert or for cooking into delicious sauces.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose apples that are firm and heavy, with bright green, unblemished skin. Avoid any with soft spots or bruises.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy these crisp apples fresh as a snack, sliced into salads for a tangy crunch, or paired with cheese. Their zesty flavour is ideal for apple pies, crumbles, and homemade applesauce. They are also a refreshing addition to smoothies.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store Granny Smith apples in the crisper drawer of your refrigerator. This helps maintain their crispness and flavour for several weeks.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, stew, sauté, roast, poach.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Strawberries. A delicious product, firm, sweet, and juicy, it's ideal for snacking or desserts. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Strawberries are firm, sweet and juicy red fruit. 

How to Pick:
Pick firm strawberries with a red and glossy appearance that are free from bruising. Fresh looking green stems are a sign of freshness! 

How to Store:
Store strawberries in their punnets or in a covered container in the refrigerator.

Where it's Grown:
Depending on seasonality, Australian strawberries are grown all year round across different regions.
In winter, most are grown in Queensland and Western Australia while in summer, most come from Victoria, South Australia and Tasmania.

Health Benefits:

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Want good quality produce? Woolworths Sweet Solanato Tomato is a delicious, sweet choice for your kitchen. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Bright red Sweet Solanato tomatoes are the size and shape of a grape and have been specially developed to combine acidity with a sweet flavour resulting in a robust tomato burst and a sweet aftertaste.

What to look for
Choose smooth, firm and plump tomatoes with an even colour and no blemishes. For best flavour make sure the fruits are fully red.

Availability
All year.

Store
Tomatoes should be stored at room temperature out of direct sunlight. It will keep the full flavour of the tomatoes. Refrigerate only if they are over ripe.

Ways to eat
Tomatoes are very versatile, they can be eaten raw as snacks, in salads and sandwiches. They can be used in soups, pizzas, omelettes, braises and stews. Tomatoes preserve well and are easily frozen and bottled, made into homemade sauces, chutneys, and dried or sundried. Tomatoes are complemented by many herbs, especially basil.

Cooking Methods
Boil, braise, barbecue/char grill, microwave, slow roast, stir fry.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Woolworths Royal Gala Apple Punnet is your delicious choice for a snack. It's Australian grown with a crisp, sweet flavour. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Royal Gala Apples are a popular choice, known for their crisp and sweet flavour. These Australian-grown apples feature creamy yellow skin adorned with vibrant red stripes, making them a delightful snack or a versatile ingredient in your kitchen.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose apples that are firm to the touch and have smooth, unblemished skin. Look for a good balance of creamy yellow and bright red colours.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy Royal Gala apples fresh as a crunchy snack on their own, or sliced in fruit salads and lunchboxes. They are also a delicious addition to baked goods like crumbles and pies, or can be cooked into sauces.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store your Royal Gala apples in a cool, dry place or in the refrigerator to maintain their crispness. For optimal freshness when refrigerating, remove them from the outer packaging.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, stew, sauté.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> These crisp Royal Gala Apples are 100% Australian grown, sourced from local farms across the country.</section>
